title: Hiring Software Engineer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
